creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-04-16 13:41:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                       pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database 0.03
  
  Mojolicious::Plugin::Database provides "sane" handling of DBI connections so
  problems with pre-forking (Hypnotoad, etc.) will not occur.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Mojolicious-Plugin-Database/
  
  PR:             ports/156044
  Submitted by:   Henk van Oers <hvo.pm@xs4all.nl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2860    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/www/p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/p5-Mojolicious-Plugin-Database/pkg-plist (new)
